name: Landmark Surveys, LLC
description: Landscape surveyor offering construction layout surveying, utility construction, tunnel boring, and channel dredging services for residential, commercial, industrial, and municipal clients

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Landmark and staff, were very patient and gave me realistic time frames
The owner of the company even spoke to me directly multiple times about the process
I dealt with other surveying companies that promised to come out but never showed up

sentiment.summary: Landmark Surveys, LLC receives overwhelmingly positive sentiment with excellent ratings for professionalism, reliability, patient communication, and exceptional owner engagement compared to competitors.
